#  Apache Flink 1.4.0 Release Announcement
December 12, 2017 - Aljoscha Krettek (@aljoscha) Mike Winters (@wints)
The Apache Flink community is pleased to announce the 1.4.0 release. Over the past 5 months, the Flink community has been work…
